description: Example portrait avatar (img2img over a reference image). Preconfigured for the DreamShaper_8 SD1.5 checkpoint with a generated reference. To make your own character: (1) drop in a real reference portrait as the reference_image, (2) set ckpt_name in example_avatar.workflow.json to a checkpoint you have installed, (3) rewrite base_positive to describe that character. Tune 'denoise' up for more expression range, down to stay closer to the reference.
base_positive: portrait of a friendly humanoid android robot, sleek white ceramic and brushed chrome face plating, expressive glowing cyan eyes, articulated mechanical facial features, head and shoulders framing, studio lighting, highly detailed, sharp focus
base_negative: blurry, low quality, deformed, disfigured, extra limbs, text, watermark, signature
